slide_1.label: Everyone
slide_1.headline: Deter burglaries before they happen.
slide_1.lede: Kevin® simulates human presence with Swiss AI—light, shadow, and sound—so your home looks lived-in from outside. No cameras. No microphones. Plug and play.
slide_1.image_alt: Kevin® presence simulator — Swiss-engineered Kevin 3 device
slide_1.callout_1_body: Connect power and place near a window—typical use around 9 W. No installation or wiring.
slide_1.callout_2_body: Simulations run locally on the device. Nothing uploaded to the cloud or shared with third parties.
slide_1.callout_3_body: 70+ hours of light, shadow, and sound keep playing—even when burglars jam Wi-Fi cameras and alarms.
slide_1.callout_4_body: Secure checkout with free delivery across Europe.

slide_2.label: Seniors
slide_2.headline: Feel safe at home—without surveillance.
slide_2.lede: Neighbours see warm light and believable movement—Kevin keeps your home looking cared for with no cameras and no microphones.
slide_2.image_alt: Night photograph of a half-timbered European house — warm lit windows with a wheelchair silhouette visible inside
slide_2.callout_1_body: Neighbours see warm light and movement — a home that looks cared for, not vacant.
slide_2.callout_2_body: Presence without surveillance — quiet deterrence that respects your privacy and dignity.
slide_2.callout_3_body: Evening scenes that match when your daughter visits — believable shadow and sound without a monitoring panel.

slide_3.label: New parents
slide_3.headline: Hold your baby—home looks occupied.
slide_3.lede: While you settle the baby, Kevin keeps believable adult movement on the ground floor—light, shadow, and sound from local storage.
slide_3.image_alt: Editorial illustration of a single mother with infant in a Dutch terraced home at evening
slide_3.callout_1_body: While you settle the baby upstairs, Kevin keeps believable adult movement on the ground floor.
slide_3.callout_2_body: Warm windows and shifting light dissuade opportunists who watch for dark, silent flats.
slide_3.callout_3_body: No cameras watching your nursery — only light, shadow, and everyday sound inside your home.

slide_4.label: Single parents
slide_4.headline: Upstairs with your child—downstairs looks busy.
slide_4.lede: Kevin simulates cooking rhythms, TV glow, and hallway footsteps so passers-by see an occupied ground floor while you are upstairs.
slide_4.image_alt: Night photograph of a brick apartment — warm upstairs bedroom light with a mother and toddler silhouetted at the window
slide_4.callout_1_body: Simulated cooking rhythms and hallway footsteps — like another adult is still downstairs.
slide_4.callout_2_body: Ground-floor TV glow and voices while you read bedtime stories on the floor above.
slide_4.callout_3_body: Silhouette and voice layers — the signal passers-by notice without you shouting.

slide_5.label: Students
slide_5.headline: Your first flat should not look empty.
slide_5.lede: Kevin makes your studio look lived-in to neighbours in the corridor—realistic household sounds without blasting music through thin walls.
slide_5.image_alt: Editorial illustration of a European student in a German Altbau studio at blue hour
slide_5.callout_1_body: Your door looks lived-in to neighbours in the corridor who notice when flats go dark.
slide_5.callout_2_body: Realistic low-level household sounds — not loud music through thin walls during exam week.
slide_5.callout_3_body: Move Kevin between bedroom and desk nook, or take it when you relocate next semester.

slide_6.label: Expat solo
slide_6.headline: New city—home still looks lived in.
slide_6.lede: One plug-and-play device simulates believable presence while you work late or explore a new country—no drilling, no landlord drama.
slide_6.image_alt: Night photograph of a brick apartment building — silhouette of a woman working on a laptop visible through a warmly lit window
slide_6.callout_1_body: You have not built local trust — Kevin makes the flat look occupied while you learn the city.
slide_6.callout_2_body: Varied evening scenes run while you work late or travel for the weekend — outsiders see life inside.
slide_6.callout_3_body: One device, no drilling, no landlord fights — presence simulation that travels with you.

slide_7.label: On holiday
slide_7.headline: Enjoy the trip—home keeps living.
slide_7.lede: Light, shadow, and sound vary while you are abroad so passers-by see everyday rhythms—not a dark, silent flat.
slide_7.image_alt: Night photograph of a German apartment facade — silhouettes of a woman holding a baby and a man visible through lit windows
slide_7.callout_1_body: Light and sound vary while you are abroad — passers-by see everyday rhythms, not a dark shell.
slide_7.callout_2_body: Lock up and Kevin shifts scenes through the day without timers on six different lamps.
slide_7.callout_3_body: Schedule simulations in advance—protection that fits around your getaway.

slide_8.label: Second home
slide_8.headline: Every property looks occupied between visits.
slide_8.lede: Schedule weekly occupancy for your holiday home or city break—hallway, living room, and kitchen rhythms rotate automatically.
slide_8.image_alt: Editorial illustration of a warm occupied European holiday home viewed from inside at night
slide_8.callout_1_body: Hallway, living room, and kitchen rhythms rotate — not one lamp on a timer for a whole week.
slide_8.callout_2_body: Manage every Kevin from one app—full coverage day and night across locations.
slide_8.callout_3_body: Weekly schedules for your Alpine flat or coast house — believable occupancy between your visits.

hero.headline: Deter burglaries before they happen.
hero.lede: Light, shadow, and sound simulate presence—no cameras, no microphones.
hero.away_body: Light, shadow, and sound vary automatically.
hero.privacy_body: 100% privacy — simulations run locally on the device.

problem.heading: When your home looks empty, you become a target.
problem.subheading: Burglars look for easy marks—dark windows, silent halls, predictable timers. 70% strike in daytime. They need five minutes. Wi-Fi jammers defeat cameras and alarms. Kevin® helps your home, flat, office, or shop look occupied from the outside—before anyone tests the door.
problem.tile_1_title: Five minutes is all it takes
problem.tile_1_body: Burglars can break in and out in minutes—often before sirens or monitoring respond. Kevin adds believable presence before anyone reaches the handle.
problem.tile_2_body: Burglars use jamming devices to disable Wi-Fi cameras and alarm systems. Kevin keeps simulating from local storage—even when the network goes down.
problem.tile_3_body: Statistics show most burglaries happen during the day when homes look empty. Kevin varies light, shadow, and sound so your space reads as lived-in.

solution.heading: Kevin® simulates people at home—so you can leave calmly.
solution.subheading: Swiss-engineered presence simulation: light scenarios, moving shadows, and everyday sounds—cleaning, cooking, conversations, playing. No cameras. No microphones. Works in homes, offices, shops, warehouses, and holiday properties.
solution.pillar_1_body: Warm, changing scenes make rooms look actively used—not simply lit. Kevin adapts rhythm for day and night deterrence.
solution.pillar_2_body: Projected silhouettes suggest one or more people inside. Visible through curtains—exactly where burglars look first.
solution.pillar_3_body: 70+ hours of built-in simulations plus your own uploads. AI-generated household sounds adapt to feel personal and less repetitive.
solution.outside_image_alt: European home at night — warm window light and moving shadow visible from the street
solution.outside_caption: What passers-by see: warm light and believable movement—not a dark, empty home.
solution.image_alt: Kevin® presence simulator — Swiss-engineered Kevin 3, studio product photo

steps.heading: Plug in. Schedule. Leave with peace of mind.
steps.subheading: No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel. Connect Kevin, set weekly schedules or geo-fencing in the app, and let believable presence run from local storage on the device.
steps.step_1_body: Place Kevin near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect power—typical use around 9 watts.
steps.step_2_body: Tell Kevin when to simulate presence—or let geo-fencing activate automatically the moment you leave, even for a short walk.
steps.step_3_body: Light, shadow, and sound play from local storage—not streamed from the cloud. Jammer-resilient protection when Wi-Fi security fails.
steps.image_alt: Kevin® device — side profile product photo

app.heading: Protection that runs while you live your life.
app.subheading: Activate instantly, schedule in advance, or let geo-fencing turn Kevin on when you leave. Manage multiple devices and properties from one app.
app.phone_6_caption: Kevin — activation, scheduling, and simulation controls
app.phone_1_caption: Simulation — tune volume, night mode, and characteristics
app.phone_2_caption: Schedule — set protection by day and hour
app.phone_3_caption: Device — rename, customize, and manage firmware
app.phone_4_caption: Geo-fencing — Kevin activates when you leave
app.phone_5_caption: Location — set where Kevin activates automatically
app.tile_1_body: Schedule simulations for weekends, holidays, or daily routines—protection that fits around your lifestyle.
app.tile_2_body: Kevin knows when you leave and starts protecting your space—no taps, no texts, just smart automation.
app.tile_3_body: Record or upload familiar home sounds. Kevin uses them—and AI-generated household audio—to create a more believable presence.
app.tile_4_body: Own several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin to each location and manage them all in one app.

personas.heading: Who Kevin® is for.
personas.subheading: Whether you commute, walk the dog, head on holiday, manage multiple properties, or already own an alarm—Kevin® fits how you actually live.
personas.persona_1_body: Start your day with confidence. On your way to work, activate Kevin® via the app. While you are out, Kevin makes it look like you are still at home—so you can focus on your job, not your doorstep.
personas.persona_1_quote: "I switch Kevin on from the app before I leave. The house feels occupied—not just lit."
personas.persona_2_body: Alarms detect intrusions—Kevin® helps prevent them. Complement your existing system with realistic presence simulation so burglars think twice before approaching.
personas.persona_2_quote: "Our alarm tells us if something happens. Kevin helps make the house look like the wrong target."
personas.persona_3_body: Juggling several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin® to each location and manage them all in one app—believable occupancy day and night.
personas.persona_3_quote: "Both flats look lived-in without asking neighbours for favours. One app, full coverage."

stats.heading: Authority you can trust.
stats.badge_1: Police-recommended in Europe and the US

proof.heading: Success looks like a home that feels alive.
proof.quote_1: "From the pavement, the light and movement make the room feel occupied. That is exactly what I wanted."
proof.quote_2: "A friend thought someone was inside and rang the bell. Kevin did its job before anyone reached the door."
proof.quote_3: "The shadow effects are the part people notice. From the stairwell, the apartment does not feel empty."
proof.summary_body: Kevin is simple to place, private by design, and most convincing from the exact perspective that matters: outside the home.

llms_page.oneliner: Kevin® simulates human presence with Swiss AI—light, shadow, and sound—so your home looks lived-in and burglars move on.
llms_page.buy_bullet: **Kevin (Buy)**: One-time purchase. Device with 70+ hours of built-in simulations, Kevin App control, Bluetooth speaker at home, free delivery in Europe, 3-year Swiss warranty.
llms_page.how_2: Schedule simulations or let geo-fencing activate Kevin when you leave.
llms_page.how_3: Light, shadow, and sound play from local storage—believable presence day and night.
llms_page.diff_1: Prevention before break-in (vs alarms that trigger after entry)
llms_page.diff_3: Swiss-engineered AI; ~9W power; plug and play
llms_page.diff_4: Jammer-resilient local playback when Wi-Fi security fails
llms_page.character: Character: Homeowners in Europe who want peace of mind when away—without cameras or monitoring.
llms_page.lede: Kevin® simulates human presence with Swiss AI. Light, shadow, and sound make your home look and sound lived-in—burglars move on. No cameras. No microphones.

faq.a1: Kevin® is a Swiss-engineered AI presence simulator. It uses light, shadow, and sound to make your home look and sound lived-in when you are away—in homes, flats, offices, and holiday properties.
faq.q2: How is Kevin different from alarms and cameras?
faq.a2: Alarms react after entry. Cameras record evidence and can fail when Wi-Fi is jammed. Kevin focuses on prevention—believable occupancy from outside before anyone tests the door.
faq.q3: Does Kevin use cameras or microphones?
faq.a3: No. Kevin simulates presence with light, shadow, and sound only. No cameras and no microphones. Simulations are stored locally on the device, not streamed from the cloud or shared with third parties.
faq.a4: Choose your color on the configure page, then continue to secure Shopify checkout with free delivery across Europe and a 3-year Swiss warranty.
faq.q5: Does Kevin work if Wi-Fi is jammed?
faq.a5: Yes. Core simulations play from local storage on the device. Kevin keeps projecting light, shadow, and sound even when burglars use jamming devices to disable Wi-Fi cameras and alarm systems.
